steps.title: Find the plant contrast
steps.content: The notes identify Touchardia latifolia as a native flowering shrub and Hedychium gardnerianum as a non-native herbaceous perennial. The student's sentence should contrast those two plants.

steps.title: Reject similarity-focused choices
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B treat the plants similarly by placing both on Oahu or in bird samples. Choice D discusses only non-native plants and one example. The sentence contrasting native and non-native status fits the goal. The answer is C.
